objective: Implement V2.4 document-to-plan runtime for requirement extraction, traceability, and task graph generation
tests_run: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python -B -m unittest tests.test_document_to_plan tests.test_repository_context tests.test_autodev_pipeline
python -c "import json, pathlib; [print('OK ' + str(p)) for p in pathlib.Path('specs').glob('*.json') if json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) is not None]"
done_criteria: Parsed development documents produce traceable requirements
Requirements link to source documents, acceptance criteria, and related repository files
ContextBundle requirements map to implementation, verification, and review task IDs
TaskGraphBuilder generates document-driven task graphs without breaking the one-line demo path
Relevant tests and contract checks pass
